104.1: winehakĕn pwa ya: oya ibu (here it is!).

definition: an exclamation of defiance or contempt. Cf yuh.

citations.text: 32.2: oyuh gajah tĕmahanamwa maran mari hyaṅ;
8.3: oyuh koṅ rākṣasâdhah gada tarima;
56.5: oyuh koṅ bala tucchabuddhi;
56.1: oyuh t aṅsö payuddha.
